final_response: At-a-glance board status: Verdant Foods is active and on track — raw data extract due end of week, week 1 kickoff to be scheduled with Ash and Priya. Crestline is active but blocked — regulatory framework update post-scoping creates a mismatch with the proposed approach, decision point on whether to pivot now (accept scope change) or pause two weeks to re-scope. Healthy: Verdant has clear milestones and signed scope. At risk: Crestline's framework mismatch could trigger a mid-stream rework decision. Outstanding: Verdant data extract confirmation, Crestline framework/scope delta analysis and strategy call.
